description: Implement the post-agent validation pipeline in internal/validate/. Runs 5 checks in order after an agent completes: clean worktree, commit exists, commit message matches template, build passes, acceptance criteria met (via agent). All checks run even if earlier ones fail. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 6 for the Validator struct, ValidationResult, CheckResult, and each check's implementation.
steps: Create internal/validate/validate.go with Validator struct (worktree manager, agent for acceptance criteria, build command from config)

Implement Validate(ctx, task, lifecycle) running 5 checks: (1) clean worktree via git status --porcelain, (2) commit exists via git log --oneline {baseSHA}..HEAD, (3) first commit message starts with task.Commit via git log --reverse, (4) build command exits 0 if configured, (5) acceptance criteria check via agent if criteria exist
All checks run regardless of prior failures; overall Passed is true only if all pass

Create internal/validate/validate_test.go using temp git repos: test all checks pass on valid worktree, test dirty worktree fails, test missing commit fails, test wrong commit message fails, test build failure (use 'false' command)
acceptance_criteria: Clean worktree check uses git status --porcelain
Commit exists check uses baseSHA not base ref name
Commit message check validates the FIRST commit on the branch (git log --reverse)
Build check runs configurable command and checks exit code
Acceptance criteria check feeds diff + criteria to agent
All checks run even if earlier ones fail
ValidationResult.Passed is false if any check fails
Each CheckResult has name, passed, and detail fields
